# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'PROD_SERVER', description: 'Production server to deploy the artifact to')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Downloading artifact from ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                    sh "curl -O ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactName = params.ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/')[-1]
                    echo "Deploying ${artifactName} to production server ${params.PROD_SERVER}"
                    sh """
                        scp ${artifactName} user@${params.PROD_SERVER}:/path/to/deploy/
                        ssh user@${params.PROD_SERVER} 'bash -s' <<'ENDSSH'
                        # Add commands to deploy artifact on the server
                        # For instance, restart service, copy file, etc.
                        echo "Deployed ${artifactName} on ${HOSTNAME}"
                        ENDSSH
                    """
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo 'Deployment successful!'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed.'
        }
    }
}
